title: Drug Formulary Entry
description: A drug entry from a health insurance plan formulary, including tier, coverage requirements, and pricing.

drug_name_brand.description: Brand name of the drug. Commonly found in: formulary document, pharmacy benefit page.

drug_name_generic.description: Generic (INN) name of the drug. Commonly found in: formulary document, pharmacy benefit page.

ndc.description: National Drug Code (NDC). Commonly found in: formulary PDF, NDC database.

manufacturer.description: Drug manufacturer. Commonly found in: formulary document, drug label.

drug_class.description: Pharmacological drug class. Commonly found in: formulary document, FDA drug class.

dosage_forms.description: Available dosage forms, strengths, and routes. Commonly found in: formulary document, drug label.

formulary_tier.description: Formulary tier which determines cost-sharing. Commonly found in: formulary document, pharmacy benefit summary.

prior_auth_required.description: Whether prior authorization is required. Commonly found in: formulary document, coverage restrictions.

quantity_limits.description: Quantity limits on coverage. Commonly found in: formulary document, coverage restrictions.

step_therapy_required.description: Whether step therapy (fail-first) is required. Commonly found in: formulary document, coverage restrictions.

plan_name.description: Name of the insurance plan. Commonly found in: formulary header, plan document.

plan_year.description: Plan year for this formulary. Commonly found in: formulary header, plan document.

retail_price_30day.description: Retail pharmacy price for a 30-day supply in USD. Commonly found in: formulary cost-sharing table, pharmacy page.

mail_order_price_90day.description: Mail order price for a 90-day supply in USD. Commonly found in: formulary cost-sharing table, pharmacy page.

generic_available.description: Whether a generic equivalent is available. Commonly found in: formulary document, pharmacy data.

black_box_warning.description: Whether the drug carries an FDA black box warning. Commonly found in: FDA label, drug monograph.

controlled_substance_schedule.description: DEA controlled substance schedule if applicable. Commonly found in: DEA database, drug label.

source_url.description: URL of the source formulary page. Commonly found in: insurance plan formulary page.

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was extracted. Commonly found in: scraper metadata.

DosageForm.description: A specific dosage form and strength of a drug.

QuantityLimit.description: Quantity limits applied to drug coverage.

days_supply.description: Days supply for the quantity limit.
